_status_note: This file is an intentionally-empty template (all hit_rate fields = 0.0) pre-HADF. The v6.0 measurement instrumentation was scoped to the standard 9-phase PM lifecycle, which had not been exercised on a dedicated feature since measurement landed. HADF will be the first feature to populate this ledger with real L1/L2/L3 cache hit rates as its 9 tasks run. Approved 2026-04-20 per open-items audit § #3.
